sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11380" key="a)panate(llw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπανατἑλλω</orth>, poet, <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπαντ-</orth>, <sense id="n11380.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make to rise, raise up from,</tr_> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:97" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.97</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:563" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">563</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
